title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama project: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, exposing sync/async APIs and chat/completion endpoints.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and modern browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package adding Ollama LLM and chat models to the LangChain ecosystem.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoints).

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST API with idiomatic Ruby syntax.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced command-line tool for Ollama with prompt templates, conversation history, and markdown output.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like plugin using Ollama models for local code completion in VS Code.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app using the official ollama-js package and Vite.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset, letting you use Ollama models in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-codex
summary: Drop-in replacement CLI for OpenAI Codex using Ollama’s CodeLlama models locally.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama with Windows/macOS/Linux binaries.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node enabling low-code workflows with Ollama models.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker Compose stacks including GPU & CPU variants and an Open-WebUI add-on.

title: ollama-mistral-finetune
summary: Tutorial repo showing how to fine-tune Mistral 7B and load the resulting GGUF into Ollama.

title: ollama-rag
summary: End-to-end RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models to any server via slash commands.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: PyPI landing page for the official ollama Python package with install stats and version history.
